subject: Charged twice for subscription renewal
body: Hi team, I looked at my bank statement and noticed I was billed twice on May 1st for my premium membership renewal. Please reverse the duplicate payment immediately. Thanks!

subject: SDK crashes with connection timeout on startup
body: Hello, I am testing the new SDK in our enterprise sandbox. Whenever I execute client.initialize(), it hangs for 30 seconds and then throws a ConnectionTimeoutError. I am behind a corporate firewall. What variables do I need to configure?

subject: Do you offer corporate training discounts?
body: Hello support, I represent a team of 15 engineers who would love to attend your Zero-to-Production training course. Do you offer bulk discounts or corporate rate cards? Let us know. Best.
